License

This page explains what you may do with Brikaya and what remains reserved.

Last updated: 2026-07-07

Play How to play FAQ About Legal Privacy Terms Data deletion Support

Personal play license

You may access and play Brikaya for personal entertainment through the official site.

This permission does not transfer ownership of the game, brand, code, artwork, audio, or other content.

Reserved rights

Brikaya and its assets are proprietary. All rights not expressly allowed are reserved by Ricardo Malnati.

No redistribution

Do not copy, modify, sell, sublicense, upload, or redistribute Brikaya or its assets without written permission.

Open web access

Links to https://brikaya.com/ are welcome when they point to the official game and do not imply endorsement.
